serverInfo.name: agent-costcenter-mcp
serverInfo.description: Per-agent cost attribution and budget management for AI agent fleets via MCP — track spend by agent, team, project, detect anomalies, compare model efficiency
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register an agent with team, project, model, and budget cap

tools.name: log_llm_call
tools.description: Log an LLM API call with auto-calculated cost from pricing table

tools.name: log_tool_call
tools.description: Log a tool or API call cost for an agent

tools.name: get_cost_report
tools.description: Get cost breakdown by agent, team, project, or all agents

tools.name: set_budget_alert
tools.description: Set spending threshold with warn or block action

tools.name: check_budget
tools.description: Check if an agent is within its budget

tools.name: get_cost_anomalies
tools.description: Find agents with unusual spending patterns (2x+ spike)

tools.name: compare_models
tools.description: Compare cost efficiency across all models used

resources.description: Current total spend across all agents
